name: Implementer
description: LLM-driven code editor — reads selected recommendations and applies them to the configured site repo. Only agent in the suite that needs Claude.

confirmation_flow.description: This agent only acts on items dispatched to its response queue by upstream agents (responder-agent → user replies, or progressive-improvement-agent → tier=auto recs when site opts in). The confirmation gate is upstream: seo-reporter emails recs; the user replies; responder-agent dispatches matched recs here. Direct manual triggering is disabled (runnable_modes=['chained']).
